question_text: What is your favorite brand of pen?
What is your favorite type of pen? (e.g., ballpoint, gel, fountain, rollerball)
On a scale of 1 to 5, with 1 being "never" and 5 being "always", how often do you use pens in your daily life?
What do you primarily use pens for? (e.g., writing, drawing, note-taking)
How important is the price of a pen when making a purchase?
What qualities do you look for when purchasing a pen? (e.g. smoothness, ink color, grip, etc.)
Of the following pen types, which do you prefer?
If you selected 'other', please specify the type of pen.
On a scale of 1 to 5, how important is ink color when choosing a pen?
What is your favorite ink color for pens?
Where do you typically purchase your pens?
